report_name: White House Overhauls Cybersecurity Policy for National Security Systems with NSPM-12

identities.name: The White House
identities.description: Issued National Security Presidential Memorandum 12 (NSPM-12) to modernize the cybersecurity framework for U.S. National Security Systems.

identities.name: National Security Agency
identities.description: Designated as the National Manager for National Security Systems (NSS) under NSPM-12, with authority to issue binding security directives and provide technical assistance to all agencies operating NSS.

identities.name: Committee on National Security Systems
identities.description: Re-established by NSPM-12 after being dormant for over 35 years, tasked with setting baseline cybersecurity requirements for all National Security Systems.

identities.name: Donald J. Trump
identities.description: Signed National Security Presidential Memorandum 12 (NSPM-12) on June 12, 2026.

identities.name: Department of War
identities.description: An affected organization whose National Security Systems fall under the scope of NSPM-12.

identities.name: Intelligence Community
identities.description: An affected community of agencies whose National Security Systems fall under the scope of NSPM-12.

identities.name: Federal Civilian Executive Branch agencies
identities.description: A class of affected organizations that operate or use National Security Systems and are subject to NSPM-12.
